what_was_done: Implemented enforcer daemon UDS socket resilience (Option C). Extracted _bind_socket() helper, added proactive watchdog to detect deleted socket file every ~1s, replaced bare OSError break with reactive rebind pattern. Added _shutting_down flag for clean SIGTERM. Commit 278570e, 1448 tests pass, manual verification confirmed.
next_steps: Fix MCP UDS socket resilience (periodic file existence check in accept loop)
Optimize whisper transcription speed (GPU/quantization or smaller model)
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
MCP UDS socket can disappear mid-session if accept loop rebind fails (MCP stdio tools unaffected)
